content.en:
Qinghe Dao Ancestor saw that the True Martial Palace Master was attacking him, and he immediately panicked.

The True Martial Palace Master didn't use any Dao techniques, he just used forbidden power to fight the enemy, but the power of the half-step domain ancestor was too terrifying, so the strength he exerted was also extremely powerful, and it was not at all comparable to their invincible Dao Ancestors.

Burst!

Qinghe Daozu was punched through, and the terrifying taboo rules spread within him, completely hitting him hard.

Subsequently, the True Martial Palace Lord attacked again, directly beating the Qinghe Dao Ancestor to pieces, healing, and then smashing it to pieces.

In this way, under the shattering again and again, Qinghe Dao Ancestor's forbidden body collapsed, and the healing speed was slow to the extreme.

Finally, in the sound of cracking, Qinghe Dao Ancestor never healed again, and his vitality was completely annihilated.

When the Qinghe Dao Ancestor fell, the blood rain of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was all over the place, the Great Dao was mournful, and countless blood-colored flowers were born in the void.

Such a vision stunned everyone!

Huo Yan tabooly, somewhere.

Ouyang Jiu'er and Ye Tian couldn't help but be shocked when they saw this scene.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian gasped and said.

"That's right, an invincible Dao Ancestor has fallen!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"That battle fluctuation in the distance should be the battle of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, but how could the Invincible Dao Ancestor fall so easily?" Ye Tian wondered.

"It should be a half-step domain ancestor participating in the battle!" Ouyang Jiu'er said solemnly: "The half-step domain ancestor has a trace of the aura of the domain ancestor, and can resist the suppression of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to a great extent, and they can burst out with very terrifying strength in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!"

After a while, another vision of the fall of the Invincible Dao Ancestor occurred.

"The second Invincible Dao Ancestor has fallen!"

Ye Tian sighed incomparably.

Invincible Dao Ancestor is such a powerful existence, I didn't expect to fall two in one day, I just don't know which force the Invincible Dao Ancestor fell, after all, he doesn't know much about Invincible Dao Ancestor.

---------------

Qinghe Dao Ancestor has fallen, and Phantom Dao Ancestor has fallen!

At this time, Tiankun Dao Ancestor was very panicked!

He could see that this person was simply killing the three of them Scattered Cultivation Invincible Dao Ancestors, and he even wondered if this person was a half-step domain ancestor of Black Wind Mountain or the three Nine Heavens forces, but he didn't dare to reveal his identity, so he hid his identity and made a move.

And killing the three of them doesn't need to worry about anything at all, because they have no power behind them and no backers.

"If I had known, I would have joined a force!"

Tiankun Dao Ancestor regretted.

In less than ten seconds, Tiankun Dao Ancestor didn't know how many attacks he had withstood from the True Martial Palace Master, and he couldn't bear it anymore, his body exploded, and he was completely dead.

The third Invincible Dao Ancestor has fallen!

The fall of the three Invincible Dao Ancestors made the hearts of the Invincible Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain, Mitian Sect, Ten Thousand Domains Temple, and Tianhai Sect explode, but they knew the situation, this person was not a half-step Domain Ancestor of his own power at all.

So, they panicked even more!

Three Invincible Dao Ancestors have already died, who is next?

Wow!

The Half-Moon Dao Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple felt that he was locked, and his heart was immediately shocked.

"Your Excellency, I am the invincible Dao Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, if you kill me, the Ten Thousand Domains Temple will definitely fight with you endlessly!"

Half Moon Dao Ancestor yelled.

However, his threat was useless, and the True Martial Palace Master killed him.

With just one blow, he was directly seriously injured, and half of his body was wiped out by a punch from the True Martial Palace Master.

Although the Half Moon Dao Ancestor recovered in an instant, his injuries did not recover much.

"Tianyang Dao Ancestor, the two of us have joined forces to contain him, if I die, you won't be able to live!"

Half Moon Dao Ancestor urged.

Tianyang Dao Ancestor is another invincible Dao Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, but where did Tianyang Dao Ancestor dare to make a move.

The two of them shot together, and it was useless.

But Tianyang Dao Ancestor still made a move, after all, the two have a good relationship, and they are invincible Dao Ancestors of the same force, if he doesn't make a move, I'm afraid that Half Moon Dao Ancestor will fall soon, and it will be his turn when the time comes.

At the very least, the two of them can last a little longer.

Of course, the real reason why Tianyang Dao Ancestor made a move was that they had a hope of surviving.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The True Martial Palace Master beat the Tianyang Dao Ancestor and the Half Moon Dao Ancestor alone, while the other invincible Dao Ancestors wanted to take the opportunity to escape, but they were very slow under the restraint of the forbidden realm, and they were attacked by the True Martial Palace Lord from time to time.

In the forbidden realm, the forbidden power of the True Martial Palace Lord could be condensed anywhere in the realm in an instant, so several other invincible Dao Ancestors were also intercepted, and there was no way to leave easily.

One second!

Two seconds!

Three seconds!

With each passing second, the injuries of Tianyang Dao Ancestor and Half Moon Dao Ancestor became more and more serious.

Finally, ten seconds passed, and the two invincible Dao Ancestors were already seriously injured.

Abrupt.

A large pale hand descended from the endless void, shattering the forbidden realm of the True Martial Palace Lord with one finger.

The forbidden realm was forced, and the invincible Dao Ancestors got rid of their shackles one after another, and quickly dispersed one by one, distancing themselves from the True Martial Palace Master.

And the True Martial Palace Master didn't go after those invincible Dao Ancestors, but looked at the owner of the pale big hand.

Click!!!

A middle-aged strong man walked out bare-chested, his aura was extremely terrifying, and he was full of domineering, as if he was a real supreme overlord.

"Who is this man?"

Several Invincible Dao Ancestors were puzzled.

They didn't even know this strong man, as if he was a person who appeared out of thin air.

But they could be sure that this person was also a half-step domain ancestor.

"I've seen the ancestor!"

Tianyang Dao Ancestor and Half Moon Dao Ancestor were very excited when they saw the man.

They knew they could survive!

"Stand down!"

The man spoke.

Tianyang Dao Ancestor and Half Moon Dao Ancestor retreated quickly, and the True Martial Palace Master did not stop them.

"Zhenwu Palace Master, one of the three palace masters of your dignified Heavenly Emperor Palace, even hid your identity and killed people, it's too much!"

The man spoke.

As soon as these words came out, the audience was shocked.

"True Martial Palace Master, one of the only three remaining Palace Masters in the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

In fact, they had also guessed before whether the mysterious person was a half-step domain ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, after all, there were so many half-step domain ancestors in the world, and it was unlikely that it could be a half-step domain ancestor of scattered cultivation.

But no matter how powerful the Heavenly Emperor Palace is, it shouldn't be able to do such a thing.

But they knew that they were wrong, and it was really the Heavenly Emperor Palace who did it!

The True Martial Palace Master knew that his identity was exposed, and he didn't hide it, so he spoke: "You should be the second-generation hall master of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor who was once famous in the Earthquake God Heaven Realm, it can be called one person suppressing one domain, and later escaped from the hands of the half-step domain ancestor with the strength of the invincible Dao Ancestor. But since then, you haven't appeared! Many people say that in order to escape for your life, you broke out the forbidden art, overdrew your potential and vitality, and fell not long after you came back! Now it seems that you are hiding, secretly breaking through to the half-step domain ancestor realm, but you have never appeared, you will really endure it!"

Zhenyu Daozu!

Invincible Dao Ancestors such as Flowing Fire Dao Ancestors also gradually appeared in their minds this incomparably ancient Dao Ancestor, which was an incomparably ancient existence in the history of the vast sea realm, almost in mythology.

Unexpectedly, such an ancient Dao Ancestor has survived until now, and he has also stepped into the realm of a half-step domain ancestor!
